evals.name: Initial CDK setup for Next.js app
evals.prompt: I have a Next.js 14 app using the App Router. I want to deploy it to AWS using CDK. Set up the initial CDK infrastructure with CloudFront, S3 for static assets, and Lambda for SSR. Include staging and production environments with separate configs.

assertions.description: Must configure next.config with output: standalone
Must create separate environment config files for staging and production
Must include CloudFront distribution in CDK stack
Must include S3 bucket for static assets
Must include Lambda function for SSR
Must handle NEXT_PUBLIC_ env vars at build time
Must set different removal policies for staging vs production
Must include cdk.json configuration

evals.name: Staged deployment with approval gate
evals.prompt: Walk me through deploying my Next.js CDK app to production. I've already got the CDK stack set up. I need to deploy to staging first, verify it works, get approval, then deploy to production. Show me the exact commands and what each step does.

assertions.description: Must show staging deployment before production
Must include cdk synth step
Must include cdk diff to review changes
Must include manual approval gate between staging and production
Must include smoke tests after deployment
Must mention rollback procedure if something goes wrong
Must include the build step with correct environment
Must mention verifying staging before promoting to production

evals.name: Production rollback after failed deployment
evals.prompt: My production deployment just failed — the Lambda function is returning 500 errors after we deployed a new version. I need to rollback immediately. What are my options and how do I execute the rollback? Also, how do I prevent this in the future?

assertions.description: Must provide a rollback command or procedure
Must mention CloudFormation rollback as an option
Must mention redeploying previous version as an option
Must include smoke tests after rollback to verify
Must mention staging-first deployment as prevention
Must mention monitoring or error rate checking
Must address the Lambda 500 error specifically
Must mention progressive rollout or canary deployment as prevention
